ocr_findings.description: QR code image on page is not captured in OCR (expected — non-text element). No text loss.

reviewer_notes: This is a preface/introductory page (reader support section + syllabus URL box at bottom, page numbered 'vii'). It does not contain learning content — it is front-matter. Existing label 'content' is incorrect; 'other' is more appropriate. OCR text faithfully reproduces all readable text including the support site URL and IPA syllabus link.
